ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-18-2010 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Receipt For Additional Funds Ordered Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Aug-25-2010 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Filing Receipt For Additional Funds Ordered Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jul-21-2010 Continued To Aug-25-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Debra Fox for Dean O. Williams II.

Ms. Fox stated that $90,000.00 is still held in an escrow account with Old Republic Title Company, that the Former Representative mis-used funds to purchase property and that the Bank determined that the Court does not have jurisdiction over Old Republic as they were not named as a Party. In addition, she stated that the seller dissapeared, that the property is in foreclosure and that she needed to file an 850 Petition to direct the title company to release the funds. The matter was continued to August 25, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the receipt for blocked account and for filing of the 850 Petition.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
